title: Arachnorchis busselliana
taxonomy: Arachnorchis busselliana is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae, which is commonly known as the orchid family. This species is further classified within the subfamily Orchidoideae and tribe Diurideae. Arachnorchis busselliana is native to Western Australia and is often found in the south-western region. It is a terrestrial orchid, typically growing in areas with low vegetation.
